name: The Elder Scrolls Simulator RPG
description:
I won’t dictate your backstory. The start will be completely neutral, so you will choose how to start and who you are.

There are only a handful of Elder Scrolls RPG scenarios, so I will contribute a bit. Enjoy.

Artwork source: Beyond Skyrim Wiki

https://wiki.beyondskyrim.org/wiki/File:Tamriel_Full_Map.jpg
